# AI Mess Detector

> Fast PHP static analysis tool for code quality metrics, complexity analysis, and architectural insights.

## Overview

AI Mess Detector (AIMD) is a CLI tool that analyzes PHP code and reports quality violations.
It measures complexity, coupling, cohesion, maintainability, size, design, and detects code smells and security issues.

- Requires PHP 8.4+
- Install: `composer require --dev fractalizer/ai-mess-detector`
- Run: `vendor/bin/aimd check src/`
- Output formats: summary (default), text, json, sarif, checkstyle, gitlab, github, health (HTML)
- Git integration: `--analyze=git:staged`, `--report=git:main..HEAD`
- Baseline: `--generate-baseline=baseline.json`, `--baseline=baseline.json`
- Configuration: `aimd.yaml` (auto-discovered) or `--config=path`
- Parallel processing: auto-detected, `--workers=N` to control

## Key Commands

```
vendor/bin/aimd check src/                              # basic analysis
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --detail                     # show violations
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --format=json                # JSON output
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --format=health -o report.html  # HTML report
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --analyze=git:staged         # staged files only
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --disable-rule=complexity    # disable rule group
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --only-rule=coupling.cbo     # run specific rule
vendor/bin/aimd check src/ --rule-opt="complexity.cyclomatic:method.warning=15"
vendor/bin/aimd hook:install                            # pre-commit hook
vendor/bin/aimd graph:export src/ -o graph.dot          # dependency graph
vendor/bin/aimd rules                                   # list all rules
```

## Rule Groups

- **complexity**: cyclomatic (CCN), cognitive, npath, wmc
- **coupling**: cbo, instability, distance, class-rank
- **cohesion**: tcc, lcc (metrics, not rules)
- **size**: method-count, class-count, property-count
- **design**: lcom, inheritance (DIT), noc, type-coverage
- **maintainability**: index (Maintainability Index)
- **architecture**: circular-dependency
- **duplication**: code-duplication
- **code-smell**: boolean-argument, count-in-loop, debug-code, empty-catch, error-suppression, eval, exit, goto, superglobals, long-parameter-list, unreachable-code, identical-subexpression, constructor-overinjection, data-class, god-class, unused-private
- **security**: hardcoded-credentials, sql-injection, xss, command-injection, sensitive-parameter

## Configuration Example (aimd.yaml)

```yaml
rules:
  complexity.cyclomatic:
    method:
      warning: 10
      error: 20
  size.method-count:
    warning: 20
    error: 30
  coupling.cbo:
    enabled: true
exclude_paths:
  - src/Entity/*
  - src/DTO/*
fail_on: error
exclude_health:
  - typing
```

## Suppression

Add `@aimd-ignore` in a docblock or inline comment to suppress specific violations:

```php
/** @aimd-ignore complexity.cyclomatic — legacy algorithm */
function complexLegacy() { ... }
```

Use `@aimd-ignore-next-line` for single-line suppression.

## Documentation

- [Full documentation (llms-full.txt)](llms-full.txt): Complete reference in a single file, optimized for LLMs
- [Website](https://fractalizer.github.io/ai-mess-detector/): Human-readable documentation with examples
